maay_maay.logged_3_policy_mixes: Waa duubay isku-dar siyaasadeed 3+ Baadhista Siyaasadda
maay_maay.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Kharashka guryuhu ku bixiyaan alaab iyo adeeg. Waa qeybta ugu weyn ee GDP-ga.
maay_maay.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Kharashka ganacsigu ku bixiyo qalabka wax-soo-saarka, dhismo cusub, iyo isbeddelka alaabta bakhaarka.
maay_maay.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Kharashka dowladdu ku bixiso alaab iyo adeeg (kuma jiraan lacagaha la wareejiyo sida Social Security).
maay_maay.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Dhoofinta laga jaray soo-dejinta. Hadda wa mid hoos ah Maraykanka (deefiseed ganacsi).
maay_maay.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Isbeddelka boqolkiiba ee GDP dhabta ah. 2-3% wa mid caafimaad qaba.
maay_maay.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Wo cabbiraa isbeddellada qiimaha celceliska ah. Waa cabbirka ugu weyn ee qiim-koorid.
maay_maay.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Boqolkiiba shaqaalaha aan shaqo lahayn. Heerka dabiiciga wa ~4%.
maay_maay.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Heerka dulsaarka ay bangiyadu isaga qaadaan. Waa qalabka ugu weyn ee Fed.
maay_maay.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Tusmada 500 shirkadood oo waaweyn oo Maraykan ah. Wo matalaa suuqa saamiyada.
maay_maay.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Sahan muujinaya sida isticmaalayaashu rajada ugu qabaan dhaqaalaha.
maay_maay.number_of_new_residential_construction: Tirada mashruucyada dhismo guri cusub ee la bilaabay.
maay_maay.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Dhoofinta laga jaray soo-dejinta. Dheeraad = koor, deefiseed = hoos.
maay_maay.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Wadarta amaahda dowladda. Deenta Maraykanka wa ~$34 trillion (2024).
maay_maay.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Wo sawiraa heerarka dulsaarka iyo waqtiga uu bondku bislaado. Haddii uu rogmado = calaamad dib-u-dhac dhaqaale.
maay_maay.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Sahan ku saabsan hawsha warshadaha. >50 = ballaadhis, <50 = yaraansho.
maay_maay.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Wo cabbiraa sinnaan-la'aanta dakhliga. 0 = sinnaan dhamaystiran, 1 = sinnaan-la'aan ugu weyn.
maay_maay.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Habka miisaaniyadda ee ugu fudud oo ugu caansan.
maay_maay.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Kaydso boqolkiiba go'an KA HOR intaadan wax kale ku bixin.
maay_maay.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Doolar kastaa wo helaa shaqa. Dakhli laga jaray kharash = eber saxan.
maay_maay.what_should_you_do_first: Shii baad MARKA HORE samayn lahayd?
maay_maay.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Shii dartii baahida shidaalku aanay u hoos u dhicin sidaad filayso?
maay_maay.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Shii dartii koorinta heerka dulsaarku ay u dhaawacdaa saamiyada?
maay_maay.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Waddan kee baa faayid isbarbardhig ku leh kombiyuutarrada?
maay_maay.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Saameynta muddada dheer ee ugu suurtogalka badan waa shii?
maay_maay.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Kharashka DHABTA ah ee jaamacadda sare waa shii?
maay_maay.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Cawaaqib dhaqaale kee baa ka daba yimid 2021-2022?
maay_maay.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Saldhigga kale wuxuu u badan tahay inuu sameeyo shii?
maay_maay.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Kani waa nooc kee oo guuldarro suuq ah?
maay_maay.how_much_should_you_contribute_at_mini: Immisa ayaad ugu yaraan ku darsan lahayd?
maay_maay.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Qiimuhu wo koraa → baahi yar, sahay badan. Qiimuhu wo hoos u dhacaa → baahi badan, sahay yar. Dheelitir: halka S iyo D ay ku kulmaan.
maay_maay.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X-M). Isticmaal + Maalgashi + Dowlad + Dhoofin Saafi ah. Wo cabbiraa wadarta wax-soo-saarka dhaqaalaha.
maay_maay.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Baahi-jiidh: lacag aad u badan oo alaab yar raacaysa. Kharash-riix: kharashka wax-soo-saarku wo kordhaa. Ku-dhex-jira: rajo mushahar iyo qiim oo isdaba socda.
maay_maay.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Heerarka dulsaarka (FFR) • Iibsi/iib bond suuqa furan • Kaydka ay bangiyadu hayn karaan • Daaqadda amaahda • Hagid mustaqbal
maay_maay.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Cashuur-kharash = Congress (cashuur/kharash). Lacag = Fed (heer dulsaar/sahay lacageed). Labaduba wo si kala duwan u saameeyaan dhaqaalaha.
maay_maay.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: U qeybi 72 heerka dulsaarka si aad u ogaato immisa sano ay ku qaadanayso in lacagtaadu labanlaabmato. 72 ÷ 8% = 9 sano oo ay ku labanlaabmayso.
maay_maay.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Jiidma (>1): raaxo, wo leeyahay beddel. Aan jiidmayn (<1): lama huraan, beddel ma leh. Jiidmo siman (=1): isbeddel % P = isbeddel % Q.
maay_maay.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Tartan Dhamaystiran → Tartan Alaab Kala Duwan → Iibiye Yar oo Xukuma → Hal Iibiye. Awood suuq oo badan = qiim koor, hufnaan yar.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Garaafka sahayda iyo baahida oo muujinaya baahi, sahay, qiimaha dheelitirka, tirada dheelitirka, dheeraad, yaraan, iyo saameynta cashuurta.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_shortage: Xadka qiimaha koor ee shaqaynaya: yaraan qiyaastii
maay_maay.canvas_summary_surplus: Xadka qiimaha hoos ee shaqaynaya: dheeraad qiyaastii
maay_maay.canvas_summary_tax_2: wo ku dhimaysaa ganacsiga ilaa qiyaastii
maay_maay.canvas_probe_hint: Ku dhufo garaafka — ama saar diirada oo isticmaal furayaasha fallaadha — si aad u baadho qiimaha iibsadaha iyo kharashka soo-saaraha tiro kasta.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Jaantuska maaliyadda shakhsiga oo muujinaya jaantus wareeg ah oo miisaaniyad bille ah iyo saadaasha kobaca dulsaarka isku-dhufan.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_stock_market: Jaantuska suuqa saamiyada oo muujinaya taariikhda qiimaha shirkadda la doortay, lacagta ururka saamiyada, saamiyada aad haysato, iyo qiimaha hadda.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Goobta jaantuska suuqa saamiyada oo diyaar u ah suuq la abuuro. Bilow jilitaanka suuqa si aad u aragto taariikhda qiimaha iyo saamiyada aad haysato.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_business: Shaxda ganacsiga oo muujinaya lacag, sumcad, dhaqaalaha xabbadda, barta dheelitirka kharashka, iyo taariikhda faayidada maalinlaha ah.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_business_empty: Meel bannaan oo shaxda ganacsiga ah. Hoos ka bilow ganacsi si aad halkan ugu aragto lacag, sumcad, iyo faayid maalinle ah.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_macro: Shaxda dhaqaalaha qaranka oo muujinaya kobaca GDP, qiim-koorid, heer dulsaar, shaqa-la'aan, dheelitirka ganacsiga, iyo taariikhda siyaasadda.
maay_maay.canvas_summary_inquiry: Habka baadhista siyaasaddu wo isticmaalaa afar jiide siyaasadeed si uu u tuso natiijo makro oo tijaabo ah. Isticmaal baararka siyaasadda ee hoos yaal si aad isu barbardhigto isbeddellada GDP, qiim-koorid, iyo shaqa-la'aan.
maay_maay.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Weydii ardayda inay saadaaliyaan haddii qiim, tiro, dheeraad, ama yaraan uu isbeddelayo ka hor inta aanay jiide dhaqaajin.
maay_maay.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Weydii ardayda inay magacaabaan hal is-dhaafsi oo miisaaniyadda ku jira iyo hal sabab oo dulsaarka isku-dhufanku ugu abaal-mariyo bilaabista hore.
maay_maay.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Weydii ardayda inay hal sharraxaad ku kala saaraan dhaqdhaqaaqa qiimaha, aasaaska ganacsiga, iyo khatarta ururka saamiyada.
maay_maay.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Weydii ardayda inay qiyaasaan immisa koob ay iibin doonaan si ay u gaadhaan barta dheelitirka kharashka, ka hor intaanay ganacsiga maalinta u furin.
maay_maay.teacher_prompt_macro: Weydii ardayda inay doortaan hal hadaf siyaasadeed oo ay tilmaamaan cabbirka muujinaya horumar ama dhaawac.
maay_maay.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Weydii ardayda jiide siyaasadeed kee dhaqaaleyahannadu ugu badan yihiin khilaaf, kaddibna ha sharxeen shii dartii tusaalahani uu yahay hage waxbarasho oo keliya.
maay_maay.literacy_tooltip: Aqoonta dhaqaale wo kortaa marka ay kordhaan fikradaha la bartay, sanooyinka la jiliyay, saxnaanta imtixaanka, iyo guulaha la gaadhay
maay_maay.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Sahay iyo Baahi — mishiinka helitaanka qiimaha
maay_maay.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Qalooca baahidu wo hoos u janjeeraa (jaban = gado badan); qalooca sahaydu wo koor u janjeeraa (qaali = soo saar badan). Qiimaha iyo tirada dheelitirku waa halka ay isku tallaabaan. Buugga Adam Smith ee 1776, Wealth of Nations, wo weli yahay aasaaska.
maay_maay.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: baahiyo / rabitaan / kayd. Dulsaarka isku-dhufanku waa yaabka siddeedaad; bilow 30 sano oo hore oo 7% ah wo u rogaa $1 $7.61. Kaararka amaahda si buuxda u bixi — 19% APR waa heer shabaq.
maay_maay.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Suuq Saami — lahaansho qeyb yar ah
maay_maay.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Gado hal saami = waxaad leedahay qeyb ka mid ah shirkadda. S&P 500 wo bixiyay celcelis ~10% sanadkii muddo 100 sano ah. Kala firdhi (ha ku dhicin hal shirkad), muddo dheerna hay (waqti suuqa lagu joogo wo ka fiican in waqtiga la doonayo).
maay_maay.business_sim_you_re_the_founder: Jilitaan Ganacsi — adiga ayaa aasaasaha ah
maay_maay.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Dakhli − kharash = faayid. Barta dheelitirka kharashku waa marka kharashyada go'an ay daboolan yihiin. Ganacsiyada yaryar ee badankood wo ku dhacaan sanadka 5aad; kuwii badbaaday wo heleen alaab suuqu doonayo. Kharashka helitaanka macmiilka (CAC) iyo qiimaha nolosha macmiilka (LTV) waa xisaabta maalinlaha ah ee aasaasaha.
maay_maay.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP wo cabbiraa wadarta wax-soo-saarka; CPI wo cabbiraa qiim-koorid; shaqa-la'aanta U-3 waa heerka ugu weyn ee la sheego. Fed-ku wo dejiyaa heerarka dulsaarka si uu u dheelitiro kobac iyo qiim-koorid — labada waajib ee Congress-ku siiyay 1977.
maay_maay.policy_inquiry_hero: Baadhis Siyaasadeed — jawaab qarsoon ma jirto
maay_maay.policy_inquiry_hero_hint: Dhaqaaji jiidayaasha, saadaali xaalka makro KA HOR intaadan akhrin, kaddibna difaac fikirkaaga. Dhaqaaleyahannada dhabta ahi runtii wo isku khilaafaan calaamadahan iyo cabbirradan.
maay_maay.try_supply_demand: Tijaabi: dhig Xadka Qiimaha Koor $30 (xakameynta kirada). Marka hore saadaali — immisa xabbo ayuu suuqu ka yaraan doonaa?
maay_maay.try_personal_finance: Tijaabi: maalgeli 15% Balanced oo dooro guriga Wehel Qol. Fiiri qiimaha guud iyo lacagta muddo 5 sano ah.
maay_maay.try_stock_market: Tijaabi: ganacso 5 maalmood, kaddibna isbarbardhig faayidadaada iyo tiilka Index (hay). Kee baa guulaysanaya?
maay_maay.try_entrepreneur: Tijaabi: hel barta dheelitirka kharashka ka hor intaadan furin, kaddibna tijaabi qiim 50% ka koor ah hal maalin. Shii ku dhacay faayidada?
maay_maay.try_macro: Tijaabi: dooro "Qabooji qiim-koorid" hadafkaaga, koori heerka dulsaarka 2 dhibcood, oo hal sano hore u soco.
maay_maay.try_inquiry: Tijaabi: soo saar istaag-qiim-koorid (qiim-koorid koor ah + GDP hoos u dhacaya) adigoo isticmaalaya jiidayaal ugu yar ee aad awoodo.
maay_maay.glossary_copied: Qaamuuska waa la koobiyeeyay — ku dhaji qoraalladaada
maay_maay.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Ku ciyaar jilitaannada si aad u hesho fikradaha dhaqaalaha! Dhacdo kastaa wo bartaa fikrad cusub oo halkan lagu daro.
maay_maay.quiz_failed_offline_hint: Abuurista imtixaanku wo guuldarreysatay — tijaabi tusaalooyinka Caqabadda ee khaanadda tixraaca (internet la'aan bay shaqeeyaan)
maay_maay.scenario_complete_3: . Tusaalooyinku wo soo noqdaan — ma ka badin kartaa taxanahaaga?
maay_maay.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Arag sida qiim-kooridku u nuugo awoodda iibsiga waqti ka dib. Doolar maanta wo ka qiim badan yahay doolar berri!
maay_maay.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Dhaqaaluhu wo maraa wareegyo isku celcelinaya oo ballaadhis iyo yaraansho ah. Ogaanshaha meesha aan wareegga ku joogno wo naga caawiyaa saadaalinta waxa xiga.
maay_maay.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: "Dulsaarka isku-dhufanku waa yaabka siddeedaad ee dunida." — Albert Einstein (loo aaneeyo)
maay_maay.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Dhaqaaleyahannadu wo isku khilaafaan! Dugsiyo fikir oo kala duwan wo siiyaan jawaabo kala duwan su'aalo isku mid ah. Fahamka aragtiyahan wo kaa caawiyaa inaad si feejignaan leh uga fikirto siyaasadda dhaqaalaha.
maay_maay.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Suuqyadu wo u kala dhaxeeyaan tartan dhamaystiran (iibiyayaal badan, alaab isku mid ah) ilaa hal iibiye (hal iibiye, alaab gaar ah). Mid kasta ku dhufo si aad wax badan u barato:
maay_maay.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Gross Domestic Product wo cabbiraa wadarta qiimaha alaabta iyo adeegyada ugu dambeeya ee lagu soo saaray xuduudaha waddan sanad gaar ah. Sidan ayay ugu qeybsantaa Maraykanka:
maay_maay.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Marka qiimuhu ↑, tirada la baahan yahay ↓. Isticmaalayaashu wo yar gataan marka qiimuhu koro. Qalooca baahidu wo hoos u janjeeraa.
maay_maay.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Marka qiimuhu ↑, tirada la sahayo ↑. Soo-saarayaashu wo badan soo saaraan marka qiimuhu koor yahay. Qalooca sahaydu wo koor u janjeeraa.
maay_maay.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Halka sahaydu baahida kula kulanto. Bartan "E" wo iskeed u dejisaa qiimaha suuqa (P*) iyo tirada (Q*).
maay_maay.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Beddelka qiimuhu wo kaa dhaqaajiyaa QALOOCA DUSHIISA. Arrimaha dibadda (tignoolajiyad, dakhli, doorbid) wo WAREEJIYAAN qalooca oo dhan.
maay_maay.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Baahidu wo u wareegtay MIDIG — Dad badan baa doonaya alaabtan (waxaa laga yaabaa in dakhligu koray, ama caan bay noqotay). Tani wo koorisaa qiimaha dheelitirka IYO tiradaba.
maay_maay.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Baahidu wo u wareegtay BIDIX — Dad yar baa doonaya alaabtan (beddel baa raqiisay, ama doorbidku wo isbeddelay). Qiim IYO tiro labaduba wo hoos u dhacaan.
maay_maay.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Sahaydu wo u wareegtay MIDIG — Soo-saarayaashu wo si raqiis ah wax badan u soo saari karaan (tignoolajiyad cusub, kharash alaab oo hoos u dhacay). Qiimuhu wo hoos u dhacaa, laakiin tiradu wo kortaa.
maay_maay.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Sahaydu wo u wareegtay BIDIX — Wax-soo-saarku wo adkaaday (masiibo dabiici ah, xeerar). Qiimuhu wo koraa, laakiin tiradu wo hoos u dhacdaa.
maay_maay.demand_flatter: — fidsan, JIIDMO badan: iibsadayaashu wo si degdeg ah ugu jawaabaan qiimaha (raaxo, alaab beddel leh).
maay_maay.demand_steeper: — toosan, JIIDMO YAR: iibsadayaashu tirada si dhib leh bay u beddelaan marka qiimuhu dhaqaaqo (baahiyo lama huraan ah sida shidaal ama dawo).
maay_maay.supply_flatter: — fidsan, JIIDMO badan: soo-saarayaashu wo si fudud u koorin ama u hoosaysiin karaan wax-soo-saarka (alaab warshadeed).
maay_maay.supply_steeper: — toosan, JIIDMO YAR: wax-soo-saarka way adag tahay in si degdeg ah loo beddelo (guryo, beero, kuraas riwaayadeed).
maay_maay.tax_incidence_1: — "fiil cashuur" ayaa u dhexeeya waxa iibsaduhu bixiyo iyo waxa iibiyuhu hayo, ganacsiyo qaar oo labada dhinacba faa'iidayn lahaa wo joogsadaan (KHASAAR AAN SOO NOQON). Hadda iibsadayaashu wo qaadaan ~
maay_maay.tax_incidence_3: % — dhinaca JIIDMADA YAR (toosan) mar walba wo qaadaa qeybta badan. Rog jiidayaasha jiidmada oo daawo sida qeybsigu u dhaqaaqo.
maay_maay.slope_note: 📚 Fidsan = jiidma: dadku wo si xoog leh ugu jawaabaan qiimaha (raaxo, beddel). Toosan = aan jiidmayn: ma beddeli karaan dhaqankooda si fudud (shidaal, dawo). Daawo cidda cashuurta qaadaysa marka aad qalooca rogto.
maay_maay.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: wo cabbiraa inta ay tirada la baahan yahay isu beddesho marka qiimuhu isbeddelo.
maay_maay.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: alaab (raaxo, alaab beddel leh) wo aragtaa hoos-u-dhac baahi oo weyn marka qiim yar oo kordha.
maay_maay.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: alaab (lama huraan sida dawo, shidaal) baahidoodu wo deggan tahay qiimuhu ha noqdo waxa uu doonoba.
maay_maay.cash_flow_warning: ⚠️ Lacagtaadu wo hoos ka jirtaa eber — wo ka bixinaysaa in ka badan waxaad kasbato. Tijaabi guri raqiis ah, boqolkiiba maalgashi oo yar, ama bixi deenta ka hor inta aanay isku dhufan.
maay_maay.months_of_expenses: bilood oo kharash ah oo lacag gacan ah
maay_maay.emergency_fund_target: la-taliyayaashu wo talinayaan in la hayo 3–6 bilood
maay_maay.flow_invested: Waxaa loo wareejiyay maalgashi (weli adigaa leh!)
maay_maay.flow_debt_interest: Dulsaar deen oo lagu daray (10% APR)
maay_maay.flow_footnote: * qeyb kama aha lacagta gacanta — kobacu wo isku dhufmaa ururka saamiyada gudihiisa; dulsaarkuna wo isku dhufmaa deentaada gudaheeda.
maay_maay.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Waxaad dhisaysaa hanti, laakiin waxaa jira deen guri + dayactir
maay_maay.investment_allocation_of_annual_salary: 📊 Qeybinta Maalgashiga (% mushaharka sanadlaha ah ee la maalgeliyay)
maay_maay.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Sharrax nooca suuqa aad doonayso inaad ka ganacsato. AI wo abuuri doonaa 5 shirkadood oo khiyaali ah oo lacago dhab u eg leh.
maay_maay.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: tusaale: "shirkado cusub oo tamar cusboonaanaysa ah", "shirkado ciyaaro", "warshadaha hawada sare", ama bannaan uga tag si loo isku daro...
maay_maay.index_lesson: 📚 Index-ka la gato-oona la hayo wo ka badinayaa ganacsigaaga. Ganacsatada firfircoon ee badankood wo ka hooseeyaan kuwa kaliya wax walba haya — sidaas darteed index fund-yadu waa talada caadiga ah.
maay_maay.concentration_warning: ⚠️ In ka badan 70% qiimaha saamiyadaadu wo ku jiraa hal shirkad. Kala-firdhintu wo yareysaa naxdinta hal shirkad — kala firdhi maalgashigaaga.
maay_maay.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Dib u dhig Suuqa & Abuur Shirkado Cusub
maay_maay.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Qor fikrad ganacsi kasta, AI-na wo abuuri doonaa kharashka bilowga, kharashka maalinlaha ah, iyo qiimaha. Kaddibna maalin maalin u socodsii!
maay_maay.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: tusaale: gaadhi cunto, socodsiin eyo, waxbarid, dukaan rooti, horumarin app...
maay_maay.biz_cash_warning: ⚠️ Ganacsigaagu wo lumiyaa lacag — lacagtu wo hoos ka jirtaa eber. Hubi dhaqaalaha xabbadda: qiimuhu ma daboolayaa kharashka xabbadda IYO qeybtaada kharashyada go'an? Koorinta qiimaha, dhimista kharashka, ama dhisidda sumcadda ayaa ah jiidayaashaada.
maay_maay.below_cost_warning: ⚠️ Qiimuhu wo ka hooseeyaa kharashka xabbadda — iib KASTA lacag baad ku lumaysaa.
maay_maay.high_price_hint: 📚 Qiimuhu aad buu uga koor yahay kii la soo jeediyay — filo in baahidu hoos u dhacdo (jiidmada qiimaha).
maay_maay.shock_oil_lesson: Kediska sahaydu wo koorisaa qiimaha ISLA MARKAASNA wo dhimaa wax-soo-saarka — cadaadis istaag-qiim-koorid, sida cunaqabateyntii OPEC ee 1973.
maay_maay.shock_tech_lesson: Kobaca wax-soo-saarku waa qadada bilaashka ah ee naadirka ah: shaqaale kasta oo wax badan soo saara wo koorisaa GDP-ga isagoon qiim-koorid kicin.
maay_maay.shock_financial_lesson: Cidhiidhiga amaahdu wo burburiyaa baahida: GDP, qiimayaal, iyo shaqaalaysiin dhamaan wo wada hoos u dhacaan, sida 2008.
maay_maay.shock_trade_war_lesson: Kastamku wo koorisaa qiimaha alaabta la soo dejiyo ee gudaha, wo-nakeenaa aargoosi ka dhan ah dhoofiyayaashaada dibadda.
maay_maay.shock_consumer_boom_lesson: Rajadu wo dhaqaajisaa dhaqaalayaasha: marka qoysasku ammaan dareemaan wo bixiyaan lacag, kharashka qofna waa dakhliga qof kale.
maay_maay.report_spend_up_2: % GDP-ga wo ku daray baahida (isku-dhufashada Keynes) — laakiin deefiseedka waa in ugu dambeyntii la maalgeliyo.
maay_maay.report_spend_down_2: % GDP-ga, taasoo baahida ka saartay dhaqaalaha.
maay_maay.report_tax_up_2: % wo ka tagtay qoysaska lacag yar oo ay bixiyaan, baahidana wo qabowjisay.
maay_maay.report_tax_down_2: % wo ka tagtay qoysaska lacag badan oo ay bixiyaan, baahidana wo koorisay.
maay_maay.report_rate_high: 🏦 Heerarka dulsaarka ee ka koor ah heerka dhexe ~3% wo ka dhigeen amaahdu qaali — maalgashi iyo shaqaalaysiin wo gaabiyeen (biriig lacageed).
maay_maay.report_rate_low: 🏦 Heerarka dulsaarka ee ka hoos ah heerka dhexe wo ka dhigeen amaahdu raqiis — baahidii amaahdu kicisay wo kortay (bansiin lacageed).
maay_maay.report_okun_2: % marka loo eego heerka caadiga ah ~2% wo u wareejiyay shaqa-la'aanta
maay_maay.goal_missed_inflation: (dhinaca khaldan ayay u dhaqaaqday — jiide kee baa koorisa kharashka amaahda?)
maay_maay.goal_missed_growth: (shii baa baahi ku dara — kharash, dhimis cashuur, ama amaah raqiis ah?)
maay_maay.goal_missed_unemployment: (Sharciga Okun: shaqa-la'aantu wo hoos u dhacdaa marka kobacu ka badnaado heerka ~2%)
maay_maay.policy_goal_label: 🎯 Hadaf siyaasadeed (dooro mid, saadaali, kaddibna hore u soco):
maay_maay.real_rate_note: 📚 Heerka dhabta ah = heerka la qoray − qiim-koorid =
maay_maay.real_rate_negative: Heerar dhab ah oo hoos ka jira eber waxay ka dhigan yihiin in amaahdayaashu guulaystaan, kuwa kaydsadaana lumaan — aad bay u dhiirrigelisaa.
maay_maay.real_rate_positive: Heerar dhab ah oo koor ah wo abaal-mariyaan kaydka, amaahdana wo gaabiyaan — wo xakameeyaan.
maay_maay.deficit_note: 📚 Kharash badan iyadoo cashuur yar la qaadayo = kharash deefiseed. Hadda wo dhiirrigelisaa, laakiin deentu waa dalab lagu hayo cashuur-bixiyayaasha mustaqbalka.
maay_maay.macro_model_disclaimer: Tusaale ciyaareed oo leh calaamado Keynesian ah oo buug-waxbarasho ah iyo shaqa-la'aan sharciga Okun — MA AHA saadaal. Dhaqaalayaasha dhabta ahi wo ku xidhan yihiin rajo, kalsooni, iyo xaalad caalami ah, dhaqaaleyahannaduna runtii wo isku khilaafaan cabbirradan (fiiri Dugsiyada Fikirka ee khaanadda tixraaca).
maay_maay.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP wo yaraanayaa. Shaqa-la'aantu wo koraysaa. Baahida guud kuma filna.
maay_maay.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Naadir iyo xun: qiim-koorid koor ah + kobac yar. Qaabkii kediska OPEC ee 1970-meeyadii. Way adag tahay in la hagaajiyo.
maay_maay.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Kobacu wo xoog badan yahay laakiin qiim-kooridku wo kacayaa. Bangiga dhexe wuxuu u badan tahay inuu si adag u biriig-yeelo.
maay_maay.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP wo koray, qiim-kooridna waa la xakameeyay. Aagga Goldilocks — hadda waa mid la sii wadi karo.
maay_maay.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Saameyn saafi ah oo yar. Jiidayaasha siyaasaddu wo isku tirtiraan.
maay_maay.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Dhaqaaji afar jiide siyaasadeed (cashuur, kharash dowladeed, heer dulsaar, kastam). Saadaali xaalka makro ka hor intaadan akhrin. Dhibco ma jiraan, jawaab qarsoon lama muujiyo.
maay_maay.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Male-awaalkaaga (jiide kee ayaa ugu khilaaf badan dhaqaaleyahannada nolosha dhabta ah? Shii dartii?)
maay_maay.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: tusaale: kastamku wo si degdeg ah u taabtaa qiimayaasha laakiin saameynta GDP-ga wo ku xidhan tahay aargoosiga...
maay_maay.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Waan istaagay — i tus su'aalaha furan
maay_maay.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Isku-darkee baa dhaliya "istaag-qiim-koorid"? Shii dartii ayay siyaasad ahaan u xanuun badnayd 1970-meeyadii?
maay_maay.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Dhimista cashuurta iyo kharashka dowladda labaduba wo dhiirrigeliyaan GDP-ga. Kee baa qiim-koorid badan ka dhaliya doolar kasta oo dhiirrigelin ah? Shii dartii?
maay_maay.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Goorma ayuu bangi dhexe si ula kac ah u KEENI lahaa dib-u-dhac dhaqaale? (Volcker 1979–82.)
maay_maay.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Kastamku ma caawiyaa shaqaalaha gudaha muddada dheer, mise wo koorisaa qiimaha qof walba? Labadaba? Halkee baa is-dhaafsigu ku jiraa?
maay_maay.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Qalabkani wo ku dhisan yahay calaamado Keynesian ah oo buug-waxbarasho keliya. Calaamado kee baa ROGMAN LAHAA dhaqaalaha dhinaca sahayda hoostiisa? MMT-ga hoostiisa? Klaasikalka-cusub (rajo caqli-gal ah) hoostiisa? Halkee buu tusaalaha Keynesian ku bixiyaa calaamad khaldan xogta dunida dhabta ah?
maay_maay.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Waan sharxi karaa shii dartii isku-darkan siyaasadeed uu u keeno xaalkan makro-dhaqaale.
maay_maay.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Qalab baadhis — dhibco ma jiraan, wax lama muujiyo, jawaab lama shubo. Cabbirradu waa hage waxbarasho, MA AHA tusaale makro dhab ah; jawaabaha dhabta ahi wo ku xidhan yihiin nidaamka lacagta, boos-banaan, rajo, iyo ganacsiga dibadda. Makradu waa mid lagu murmo — dhaqaaleyahannadu wo isku khilaafaan calaamadaha iyo cabbirrada.
